info.title: Zytrixon Truck Billing API
info.description: Official API documentation for the Zytrixon Truck Billing mobile application.

post.description: Sends a password reset link to the user's email.
Update the user's password using a valid reset token.
Authenticate a user and return a token with profile data.
Create a new account and return an authentication token.
Update profile details including profile photo. Use POST with _method=PUT for multipart support.
Update driver details and documents. Use POST with _method=PUT for multipart/form-data support.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of trips based on the authenticated user's role.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by location, truck, or ID

post.description: Marks trip as completed and releases the vehicle.

get.description: Generates and downloads a comprehensive PDF report of the trip including billings and transactions.

get.summary: Get all billing entries for a trip
get.description: Returns all multi-party billing entries for a specific trip.

post.summary: Add a billing entry to a trip
post.description: Creates a new party billing entry for a specific trip.

get.description: Returns details of a single trip billing entry.

get.summary: Get all transactions for a trip
get.description: Returns all expense and recovery transactions for a specific trip.

post.summary: Add a transaction to a trip
post.description: Creates an expense or recovery transaction for a specific trip, adjusting wallets automatically.

get.description: Returns details of a single trip transaction.

put.description: Updates an existing transaction and adjusts wallets by reversing the old value and applying the new one.

delete.description: Deletes a transaction and reverses its effect on the driver wallet.

post.description: Update vehicle details and documents. Use standard POST for multipart/form-data support.

get.description: Owner gets all driver wallets, driver gets their own wallet.

post.summary: Add funds to a driver wallet

get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of transactions for a specific wallet.

bearerAuth.description: Enter your Laravel Sanctum bearer token here to authenticate.
